violations.description: Suite-level serial mode reduces isolation guarantees and can hide latent order coupling.
violations.suggestion: Use parallel mode by default and isolate any truly dependent scenario into a dedicated block.

violations.description: API automate suite is forced serial despite read-oriented scenarios.
violations.suggestion: Allow parallel execution to validate independence and improve CI throughput.

recommendations: Remove serial mode where tests do not share mutable state
Keep per-test context creation pattern as current baseline
summary: Isolation is strong with per-test setup, but serial execution settings unnecessarily reduce isolation confidence.
